Past ML4H events

Programs, proceedings, and highlights from previous editions of ML4H.

ML4H Symposium

ML4H became an independent standalone symposium starting in 2021.

December 1–2, 2025  ·  The Westin San Diego Gaslamp, San Diego, CA, USA

ML4H was a NeurIPS workshop prior to 2021.
